description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise with a deep, dark fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The backrest is straight and moderately high, featuring subtle tufting with evenly spaced buttons for a touch of elegance. Both armrests are of equal height and thickness, forming a continuous line with the backrest and creating a boxy silhouette. The seat is wide and flat, providing ample space for lounging, and the legs are short, straight, and black, barely visible beneath the frame. The upholstery appears to be a solid, dark color with a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the fabric. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with dark, tufted upholstery, straight armrests, and short black legs. The design is minimalist and sturdy, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the tufted backrest, both armrests, and the wide seat.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the solid, rectangular armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned backrest and the symmetry of the armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and seat depth from the opposite side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, moderately high, and features subtle tufting with evenly spaced buttons, giving it a refined yet understated look. It is continuous with the armrests and lacks any curvature or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both armrests are present, straight, and of equal height and thickness, forming a boxy frame on either side of the seat.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and black, with a simple cylindrical or blocky shape and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, dark color with a matte finish and features subtle tufting on the backrest, but no visible patterns or prints.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide seat cushion integrated into the frame, with no loose or additional cushions visible. The backrest is also cushioned and attached, forming a unified structure.
